characters.name: Andrew Jackson
characters.description: Andrew JacksonBackground informationVoiceDonovan PattonCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleNicknamesMr. AmericanFriendsBunniculaLafitteEnemiesLafitte(formerly) Andrew Jacksonis a minor character ofBunnicula. He is captured byLafitteand his crew. Andrew and Lafitte worked together to defeat the British by using a special locket that showed the future. After successfully scaring the british off, he keeps his word and pardons Lafitte while calling him by his real name.

characters.name: Ann Monroe
characters.description: Ann MonroeDescriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleBiographical informationStatusAliveRelativesRobert Monroe(husband)Toby Monroe(son)Pete Monroe(son)Behind the scenesVoice actorJanet Waldo(TV special)Ann Monroeis the mother ofTobyandPete Monroeand the wife ofRobert Monroe. Ann has always liked the name "Fluffy" for a pet, though none of the Monroe pets are named Fluffy. She came up with the name "Bunny-cula", later Bunnicula, for the rabbit. Harold mentions that Chester and he were called Fluffy for the first few days of living with the Monroes. characters.description: BarbaraBackground informationVoiceKate HigginsCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleFamilyBecky(daughter) Barbarais a character ofBunnicula. She is mother ofBecky. characters.name: Brycie
characters.description: BrycieBackground informationVoiceKari WahlgrenCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAgeAround 3 years oldFamilyUnnamed MotherEnemiesBunnicula,Chester,Harold Brycieis a minor character ofBunnicula. It is unknown whether or not she lives in New Orleans, but Brycie was clearly there for an Easter Block Party and egg hunt that was taking place not too far from the Orlock Apartments. Brycie was very well behaved until chocolate was mentioned, leading her to fight off the other kids to get her favorite treat.

characters.name: Bunnicula's Bride
characters.description: Bunnicula's BrideBackground informationVoiceKari WahlgrenCharacter informationSpeciesVegetable animaligram shaped like a rabbit. Veggie franken-bunny thingGenderFemaleFriendsBunnicula(formerly)EnemiesChester,Harold,Bunnicula Bunnicula's BrideisMina's creation. Mina created her out of veggies as part of a science project. After Mina failed to give her life using the static electricity inChester's coat,Bunniculapulled a prank on the cat using the same static electricity and then attempted to drain the Bride. However, the electricity he had absorbed pranking Chester came out through his fangs and zapped the Bride to life. She immediately put him under a love spell and they began doing lots of romantic things together. Chester became suspicious of her, and she harvested Bunnicula's  supernatural energies in order to create an army of evil vegetables in order to take over the world. She sent her army to kill Chester andHarold, but Chester used Harold's squeaky newspaper toy to snap Bunnicula out of his trance. Bunnicula knocked the zombie vegetables into a pile and then killed them using weed killer. The Bride then attacked them with electricity, and was defeated by Bunnicula when he drained an onion, allowing him to blast her with water, causing the Bride to be electrocuted. She then ran away, saying she was going to date a millionaire.

characters.name: Bunnicula/TV Series
characters.description: This article is about the TV series character. You may be looking for thebook seriesorcharacter from the book series, or thetelevision series.BunniculaDescriptionNicknamesBunMr. BunnyBunnyBunnicBunnickBun-BunMasterHoney Child (byCassandra)Stranger (byVeronica Rabbit)Mr. PersonConejo (byMilo & Otto)BJ (himself pretending as his false son)Bunnicula JR (himself pretending as his false son)SpeciesVampire RabbitGenderMaleAgeImmortalEyesRedHairBlack and WhiteBiographical informationStatusActiveRelativesUnnamed younger brotherOwnersDracula(formerly)[1]Count Orlock(formerly)[2]Lafitte(formerly)[3]Mina Monroe(current owner)FriendsChesterHaroldGiant CockroachPatchesSiobhanLugosiCassandraRussellGiant AnacondaGiant CaterpillarThomas EdisonHideous ThingFrankengatorInvisible BaboonBeast from 20,000 ToiletsBat MonsterGiant SnakeQuetzalcoatlVeronica RabbitToddler RabbitMa RabbitPa RabbitElderly RabbitLafittePirate ChesterPirate HaroldZogthorMarvinQueen SewarielSewer MermaidsEnemiesWalking FishSpiderLambFluffy (formerly)Evil 80's Mouse(formerly)GrimbyteRandillCount CavandaMr. MolesbeeWoodyTiny TrollGretaCaptain Von KrinkleBehind the scenesVoice actorChris KattanFirst appearance"Mumkey Business"Last appearance"Oh Brother!"Bunniculais the main protagonist of theanimated series of the same name. Queen SewarielSewer Mermaids Bunnicula is a cute vampire rabbit. His body colors are black and white. He has a black back that consists of a pattern extending from part of his forehead all the way to his tail. The white part of Bunnicula's body appears in a transparent color, from his face to his feet. Bunnicula also possesses large, red eyes. Bunnicula is very mischievous and enjoys playing tricks to scare his friends (especially Chester). He speaks in a language that only Harold and his fellow monsters can understand. He cares for his friends, especially Mina, and will go to great lengths to keep them safe when they are in danger.
